query: ALTER TABLE quotations ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS clientResponseStatus ENUM('aprobado','rechazado','revision') NULL, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS clientResponseNotes TEXT NULL, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS clientResponseAt TIMESTAMP NULL, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS whatsappApiSentAt TIMESTAMP NULL;
